title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
